context: =  completely formed but congenitally small bronchus with rudimentary parenchyma + small vessels Cause: Path:  absolute decrease in lung volume / weight for GA √  thoracic circumference (TC) < 5th percentile for EGA √  TC÷AC length ratio < 0.32 √  FL÷AC ratio < 0.16 √  small hyperlucent lung ← oligemia √  diminutive ipsilateral pulmonary artery √  hyperlucent contralateral lung ← compensatory hyperexpansion √  ipsilateral mediastinal shift
